brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Gold zone transformation of College Scorecard data. Reads 69,947 rows from base.college_scorecard (Silver), computes CIP-family percentile bands via window functions, derives financial ratios (debt-to-earnings, earnings growth, program value index), assigns confidence tiers and convenience flags, computes deterministic record_id via grain hash, and promotes to consumable.career_outcomes via idempotent promote pattern.

documentation.description: Transform Silver base.college_scorecard into Gold consumable.career_outcomes. Computes cross-institution CIP-family percentile bands (p25/p75) for earnings and debt via PERCENTILE_CONT window functions with minimum sample guard (>=3 non-null values). Derives debt-to-earnings ratio and tier classification, earnings growth rate, CIP-family earnings rank via PERCENT_RANK, program value index (ROI proxy), confidence tier from cohort size and data availability, convenience flags (has_earnings, has_debt), and outcome completeness score. Renames completions_count_1 to completions_count. Drops credential_description, completions_count_2, and ingested_at from Silver. Promotes via idempotent append with dedup on record_id.

record_id.transformationDescription: Deterministic grain hash computed via compute_grain_id(row, ['unitid', 'cipcode', 'credlev'], prefix='co'). SHA-256 of concatenated grain fields with 'co' prefix. Note: credential_level from Silver is mapped to 'credlev' key in the grain dict before hashing.

unitid.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Silver. IPEDS institution identifier, no transformation applied.

institution_name.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Silver. No transformation applied.

institution_control.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Silver. No transformation applied.

cipcode.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Silver. Normalized CIP code in XX.XX format.

program_name.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Silver. Human-readable program description.

cip_family.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Silver. 2-digit CIP family code.

cip_family_name.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Silver. CIP family taxonomy description.

credential_level.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Silver. Integer credential level (e.g., 3=Bachelor's).

earnings_1yr_median.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Silver. Median earnings 1 year post-completion. Null values preserved.

earnings_2yr_median.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Silver. Median earnings 2 years post-completion. Null values preserved.

debt_median.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Silver. Median debt at graduation. Null values preserved.

completions_count.transformationDescription: Column rename from 'completions_count_1' to 'completions_count'. First-major IPEDS completions count. Second-major completions (completions_count_2) dropped per spec.

small_cohort_flag.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Silver. Boolean flag for programs with fewer than 30 completers.

earnings_1yr_p25.transformationDescription: PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) of earnings_1yr_median across all institutions within the same cip_family. Only CIP families with >= 3 non-null earnings_1yr_median values get a percentile; otherwise null. Computed via DuckDB window function with minimum sample guard.

earnings_1yr_p75.transformationDescription: PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) of earnings_1yr_median across all institutions within the same cip_family. Only CIP families with >= 3 non-null values get a percentile; otherwise null.

earnings_2yr_p25.transformationDescription: PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) of earnings_2yr_median across all institutions within the same cip_family. Only CIP families with >= 3 non-null earnings_2yr_median values get a percentile; otherwise null.

earnings_2yr_p75.transformationDescription: PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) of earnings_2yr_median across all institutions within the same cip_family. Only CIP families with >= 3 non-null values get a percentile; otherwise null.

debt_p25.transformationDescription: PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) of debt_median across all institutions within the same cip_family. Only CIP families with >= 3 non-null debt_median values get a percentile; otherwise null.

debt_p75.transformationDescription: PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) of debt_median across all institutions within the same cip_family. Only CIP families with >= 3 non-null values get a percentile; otherwise null.

debt_to_earnings_annual.transformationDescription: debt_median / earnings_1yr_median. Null-safe: returns null if either debt_median or earnings_1yr_median is null. Key affordability metric per Department of Education Gainful Employment guidance.

debt_to_earnings_tier.transformationDescription: Bucketed classification of debt_to_earnings_annual: 'Low' (< 0.75), 'Moderate' (0.75-1.5), 'High' (1.5-2.5), 'Very High' (>= 2.5). Null if debt_to_earnings_annual is null. Based on DoE Gainful Employment rule thresholds.

earnings_growth_rate.transformationDescription: (earnings_2yr_median - earnings_1yr_median) / earnings_1yr_median. Null-safe: null if either input is null. Negative values valid (cohort differences between measurement years, not individual regression).

cip_family_earnings_rank.transformationDescription: PERCENT_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY cip_family ORDER BY earnings_1yr_median). Range 0.0-1.0 where 1.0 = highest earner in CIP family. Null for rows where earnings_1yr_median is null (LEFT JOIN excludes nulls from ranking).

program_value_index.transformationDescription: earnings_1yr_median / debt_median. ROI proxy — higher values indicate better value (more earnings per dollar of debt). Null-safe: null if either input is null.

confidence_tier.transformationDescription: Data quality classification: 'high' (large cohort + has earnings + has debt), 'medium' (large cohort + has earnings or debt), 'low' (small cohort + has some data), 'insufficient' (no earnings and no debt). Every row gets a tier. Derived from small_cohort_flag and nullity of earnings/debt fields.

has_earnings.transformationDescription: Boolean convenience flag: True if earnings_1yr_median IS NOT NULL OR earnings_2yr_median IS NOT NULL. Simplifies downstream filtering.

has_debt.transformationDescription: Boolean convenience flag: True if debt_median IS NOT NULL. Simplifies downstream filtering.

outcome_completeness.transformationDescription: Fraction of 3 core outcome fields (earnings_1yr_median, earnings_2yr_median, debt_median) that are non-null. Computed as count_non_null / 3.0, snapped to exact value set {0.0, 0.33, 0.67, 1.0} via _snap_outcome_completeness() to prevent floating-point drift.

source_load_date.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Silver. Original data load date preserved through zone transition.

promoted_at.transformationDescription: UTC timestamp generated at Gold promotion time via datetime.datetime.now(tz=datetime.timezone.utc). Records when data was promoted to consumable.career_outcomes.

completions_count_2.reason: Second-major completions not relevant to career outcomes query pattern. Retained completions_count_1 as completions_count per spec.

credential_description.reason: Redundant with credential_level (always 'Bachelor's Degree' in MVP). Dropped per spec.

ingested_at.reason: Silver metadata timestamp replaced by promoted_at in Gold zone per spec.

record_id (Silver).reason: Silver grain hash (prefix 'cs') replaced by Gold grain hash (prefix 'co') with same grain fields. New record_id computed for Gold zone identity.
